testcase.name: Money add adds money values with the same currency

testcase.classname: Money subtract subtracts money values with the same currency

testcase.classname: Money comparison checks whether money is less than another value with the same currency
testcase.name: Money comparison checks whether money is less than another value with the same currency

testcase.classname: Money comparison throws when comparing different currencies
testcase.name: Money comparison throws when comparing different currencies

testcase.name: Money equals returns true for equal amount and currency

testcase.classname: Money equals returns false for different amounts

testcase.classname: Money equals returns false for different currencies
testcase.name: Money equals returns false for different currencies

testcase.name: RedisCacheService getJson возвращает распарсенный объект при наличии ключа

testcase.classname: RedisCacheService getJson не бросает исключение при невалидном JSON

testcase.name: RedisCacheService deleteByPattern удаляет ключи найденные через SCAN

testcase.classname: RedisCacheService deleteByPattern не вызывает del если ключей нет
testcase.name: RedisCacheService deleteByPattern не вызывает del если ключей нет

testcase.classname: RedisCacheService deleteByPattern итерирует несколько страниц SCAN до cursor === "0"
testcase.name: RedisCacheService deleteByPattern итерирует несколько страниц SCAN до cursor === "0"

testcase.classname: RedisCacheService deleteByPattern использует SCAN вместо KEYS (не вызывает redis.keys)
testcase.name: RedisCacheService deleteByPattern использует SCAN вместо KEYS (не вызывает redis.keys)

testcase.name: ProductCacheService getDetail возвращает null при cache miss

testcase.name: ProductCacheService getList возвращает null при cache miss

testcase.classname: ProductCacheService getList формирует ключ с "all" если categoryId/ownerId не переданы
testcase.name: ProductCacheService getList формирует ключ с "all" если categoryId/ownerId не переданы

testcase.classname: ProductCacheService setList сохраняет список с правильным ключом и TTL 60 секунд
testcase.name: ProductCacheService setList сохраняет список с правильным ключом и TTL 60 секунд

testcase.classname: ProductCacheService invalidateDetail вызывает deleteByPattern для конкретного продукта
testcase.name: ProductCacheService invalidateDetail вызывает deleteByPattern для конкретного продукта

testcase.classname: ProductCacheService invalidateDetail вызывает deleteByPattern для инвалидации всех списков
testcase.name: ProductCacheService invalidateDetail вызывает deleteByPattern для инвалидации всех списков

testcase.classname: ProductCacheService invalidateDetail вызывает deleteByPattern ровно 2 раза (detail + list)
testcase.name: ProductCacheService invalidateDetail вызывает deleteByPattern ровно 2 раза (detail + list)

testcase.classname: ProductService create creates a product when the generated slug is unique
testcase.name: ProductService create creates a product when the generated slug is unique

testcase.classname: ProductService create throws ConflictException when the generated slug already exists
testcase.name: ProductService create throws ConflictException when the generated slug already exists

testcase.classname: ProductService findById returns a product from cache when it exists
testcase.name: ProductService findById returns a product from cache when it exists

testcase.classname: ProductService findById loads a product from repository and stores it in cache on cache miss
testcase.name: ProductService findById loads a product from repository and stores it in cache on cache miss

testcase.classname: ProductService findById throws NotFoundException when the product does not exist
testcase.name: ProductService findById throws NotFoundException when the product does not exist

testcase.classname: ProductService findMany returns cached list results with the requested pagination metadata
testcase.name: ProductService findMany returns cached list results with the requested pagination metadata

testcase.classname: ProductService findMany loads list results from repository and caches them on cache miss
testcase.name: ProductService findMany loads list results from repository and caches them on cache miss

testcase.classname: ProductService update updates a product and invalidates cache when requester is the owner
testcase.name: ProductService update updates a product and invalidates cache when requester is the owner

testcase.classname: ProductService update allows an admin to update a product owned by another user
testcase.name: ProductService update allows an admin to update a product owned by another user

testcase.classname: ProductService update throws ForbiddenException when requester is neither owner nor admin
testcase.name: ProductService update throws ForbiddenException when requester is neither owner nor admin

testcase.classname: ProductService update throws NotFoundException when product does not exist
testcase.name: ProductService update throws NotFoundException when product does not exist

testcase.classname: ProductService delete deletes a product and invalidates cache when requester can modify it
testcase.name: ProductService delete deletes a product and invalidates cache when requester can modify it

testcase.classname: ProductService delete throws NotFoundException when product does not exist
testcase.name: ProductService delete throws NotFoundException when product does not exist
